title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Katakuri, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't let him get AwaaaA AAAY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that's right... you definitely can't let him get away....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy... He's the only one who abso- lutely cannot get away.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: By diverting Big Brother Katakuri's attention....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me tell you... what really happened in the micro- world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The perfect... strongest... and also- lute best...

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Big Brother of Ours, Katakuri, was...

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Katakuri... Your legendary underfated record was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's no way big brother would lose!!

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Big Brother Katakuri couldn't have lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must've used some kind of a dirty trick!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: destroy every last piece of him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll smash you back down to the ground again-yu!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 44 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
